articles.title: Lunar bombardment of earth is practical
articles.summary:
Previous analyses likely anchored on mass drivers(costly, heavy) rather than sling launchers or ignored the possibility of launching and storing projectiles in parking orbits for later strikes. Both of these changes make lunar bombardment much more practical.

articles.title: Rent from oil: a goldmine
articles.summary: tl,dr: ground rent from fossil fuels is much greater than the negative externality costs of greenhouse gases, implying it is realistic that we can neutralize all emissions in the near future without any further economic deadweight or the need to subsidize other energy sources.
